03 — HOW IT WORKS

        
THIS IS WHATyou were missing.

        
Kloth builds your AI fashion twin — it tries every outfit on your exact body before you spend a rupee.

        
AI Reads Your Body Shape
One scan. Precise 3D measurements. Remembered forever across all brands.

        
Outfits Adapt to You
See S, M, L, XL on YOUR body. Not a model's. Not a guess.

        
Zero Guesswork. Zero Returns.
Buy with certainty. Your wardrobe — curated, fitted, confirmed.

04 — THE VISION

      
Meet yourAI Stylist

      
More than a try-on. A fashion intelligence that evolves with you.

    

    

      
Style DNA
Kloth learns your silhouettes, palette, and lifestyle to curate looks that feel exactly like you.
∞ style memory

      
Fit Intelligence
Your AI twin holds your exact measurements across every brand, every cut, every fabric.
97% fit accuracy

      
Pre-Purchase Clarity
See it before you buy it. On your body. In your size. The future of fashion is visual certainty.
−80% return rate
